conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I have two cats, Milo and Luna.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Milo is the more adventurous one, always trying to sneak outside.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Luna mostly just sleeps all day and avoids the other cat.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Milo actually figured out how to open the pantry door once.
